case_title: GEORGE PENG VS. LORRAINE M LARSON et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PENG, GEORGE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LARSON, LORRAINE M CASTELINOS, VANESSA RIVAS, ENRIQUE RIVAS, EZEKIAL CASTELLINOS RIVAS, SABINO ANY/ALL UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 21 CARR STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94124, COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, LEASE FORFEITED, **APPLIES TO ALL UNNAMED/UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS.**

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PENG, GEORGE SERVED JUL-18-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CASTELINOS, VANESSA
